title: crepidium latum
intro: Crepidium latum, also known as the flat leaf crepidium, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Crepidium latum include lowering blood pressure, reducing the risk of heart disease, and providing antioxidant properties. Crepidium latum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to limited research on its effects and potential interactions.
